questionHtml:
Changes in heart rate occur during and after a period of exercise.

 

Which structure sends messages to the sinoatrial node of the heart to cause changes in heart rate?

A. Adipose tissue

B. Medulla of the brain

C. Pineal gland

D. Thyroid gland

meta.title: Changes in heart rate occur during and after a period of exercise. Which structure sends messages to the sinoatrial node of the heart to cause changes in heart rate? A. Adipose tis
